sub_modules.conv3d_stream_index: Combinational mapper from flattened stream index to x/y/z coordinates and input range status.
sub_modules.conv3d_window_extract: Combinational 3D sliding-window extractor from the flattened volume history buffer.
sub_modules.conv3d_mac: Combinational multiply-accumulate array over the flattened 3D stencil and kernel coefficients.
sub_modules.conv3d_output_cast: Combinational output-width cast from the wide MAC sum to the required voxel output width.
